requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — GNBS Conformity and Project Procurement
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——GNBS合格评定和项目采购
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——GNBS合格評定和項目採購

summary.en: The Guyana National Bureau of Standards is Guyana's national standards body and publishes standardisation, compliance, product-inspection, importer/manufacturer registry, and certification information. For PV inverters, exporters should expect GNBS, public procurers, GPL, GEA-supported projects, and private project owners to request internationally recognised electrical safety evidence. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the core safety standards for power converters and inverters used in photovoltaic power systems. Evidence should identify the exact model, rating, firmware/hardware family, environmental ratings, markings, and installation limitations for Guyana's tropical and 60 Hz service context.
summary.zh: 圭亚那国家标准局是圭亚那国家标准机构，并发布标准化、合规、产品检验、进口商/制造商登记和认证信息。对于光伏逆变器，出口商应预期GNBS、公共采购方、GPL、GEA支持项目和私营项目业主要求国际认可的电气安全证据。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏电力系统用功率变换器和逆变器的核心安全标准。证据应明确适用于圭亚那热带环境和60 Hz供电背景的具体型号、额定值、固件/硬件系列、环境等级、标识和安装限制。
summary.zht: 圭亞那國家標準局是圭亞那國家標準機構，並發布標準化、合規、產品檢驗、進口商/製造商登記和認證資訊。對於光伏逆變器，出口商應預期GNBS、公共採購方、GPL、GEA支持項目和私營項目業主要求國際認可的電氣安全證據。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏電力系統用功率轉換器和逆變器的核心安全標準。證據應明確適用於圭亞那熱帶環境和60 Hz供電背景的具體型號、額定值、韌體/硬體系列、環境等級、標識和安裝限制。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
GNBS standardisation, compliance, product inspection, and certification framework
Project-owner procurement requirements for public, utility, commercial, hinterland, or off-grid solar projects

summary.en: China-side documentation commonly includes GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 test reports, CQC/CGC voluntary certification, factory quality-system documents, and CNAS laboratory reports. These can support technical due diligence but are China domestic references. They should not be represented as automatic substitutes for IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence, GNBS conformity expectations, GPL interconnection documentation, or project-owner procurement requirements in Guyana.
summary.zh: 中国侧文件通常包括GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004测试报告、CQC/CGC自愿认证、工厂质量体系文件和CNAS实验室报告。这些资料可支持技术尽调，但属于中国国内引用，不应表述为IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据、GNBS合格评定预期、GPL并网文件或圭亚那项目业主采购要求的自动替代。
summary.zht: 中國側文件通常包括GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004測試報告、CQC/CGC自願認證、工廠品質體系文件和CNAS實驗室報告。這些資料可支持技術盡調，但屬於中國國內引用，不應表述為IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據、GNBS合格評定預期、GPL併網文件或圭亞那項目業主採購要求的自動替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification schemes for PV inverter products in China

gap.en: Gap: China domestic safety evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates and reports from an appropriately accredited laboratory, plus nameplate, installation manual, tropical-environment rating, surge-protection, grounding, and service documentation. If the inverter is reconfigured from China factory defaults to Guyana 60 Hz / 120-240 V settings, the safety file should identify whether the change affects ratings, protective functions, thermal performance, or certification model-family coverage.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内安全证据应补充由适当认可实验室出具的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书和报告，以及铭牌、安装手册、热带环境额定值、防浪涌、接地和服务文件。若逆变器从中国出厂默认设置重新配置为圭亚那60 Hz / 120-240 V设置，安全文件应说明该变更是否影响额定值、保护功能、热性能或认证型号系列覆盖范围。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內安全證據應補充由適當認可實驗室出具的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書和報告，以及銘牌、安裝手冊、熱帶環境額定值、防浪湧、接地和服務文件。若逆變器從中國出廠預設設置重新配置為圭亞那60 Hz / 120-240 V設置，安全文件應說明該變更是否影響額定值、保護功能、熱性能或認證型號系列覆蓋範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by GNBS import/conformity review, public procurement, GPL/GEA project review, or project-owner specifications; IEC 62109 evidence is expected as the safety baseline for PV inverters
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-scheme-dependent under China domestic practice; not a substitute for Guyana-facing IEC safety evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 62109-1/-2 as the primary safety evidence package for Guyana-facing PV inverter submissions, and treat China GB/T or NB/T reports as supporting background only. Confirm the current GNBS conformity route and any project-owner safety documentation requirements before shipment, especially where firmware is changed from China's 50 Hz defaults to Guyana's 60 Hz configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向圭亚那提交光伏逆变器资料时，应以IEC 62109-1/-2作为主要安全证据包，并仅将中国GB/T或NB/T报告作为辅助背景资料。出货前请确认当前GNBS合格评定路径及任何项目业主安全文件要求，尤其是在固件从中国50 Hz默认设置改为圭亚那60 Hz配置时。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向圭亞那提交光伏逆變器資料時，應以IEC 62109-1/-2作為主要安全證據包，並僅將中國GB/T或NB/T報告作為輔助背景資料。出貨前請確認當前GNBS合格評定路徑及任何項目業主安全文件要求，尤其是在韌體從中國50 Hz預設設置改為圭亞那60 Hz配置時。
